#pure implies throws Never, effects {}, no suspension, no unsafe authority, and no mutable/authority/resource capture. Literal capture acquisition is checked separately from behavior at invocation; pure does not imply total, deterministic, CTFE, or allocation-free.
..) = return expr may elide #pure only after the body proves throws Never/effects {}.
Stable: def#pure is exactly throws Never + effects {} + no suspension/unsafe authority; it is not termination, memoization, or CTFE.
